ItacPersonItem.Notes: Professor of Humanae Litterae at Rome, La Sapienza; he was member of numerous Academies. He delivered a funereal oration on the occasion of Elena Lucrezia Cornaro Piscopia`s funeral in the Accademia degli Infecondi. Brugueres joined the Ricovrati in 1678. He was the author of Trionfo della virtu`, which he dedicated to Benedetto Pamphili as Principe degli Umoristi - See Montalto, Un mecenate (1953).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
